# Logs King — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A marketplace platform focused on the sale of social media account credentials and logs. The platform connects buyers and sellers of accounts across various social media platforms.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://logs-king-ab7f1988.zappy5.app
Step into the King Log House, where buyers and sellers trade social media credentials securely. Explore top accounts and reign supreme. Join the kingdom today!

### Marketplace Features
https://logs-king-ab7f1988.zappy5.app/features
Unlock powerful vtex marketplace features built for serious traders. Filter, verify, and dominate social media account deals. Elevate your hustle now!

### About
https://logs-king-ab7f1988.zappy5.app/about
Discover the vision behind the ultimate vtex marketplace platform for social media logs. Built for trust, speed, and profit. Learn our story and join the revolution!

### Contact
https://logs-king-ab7f1988.zappy5.app/contact
Need a guide in the king log house? Reach out to our vtex marketplace squad for fast, royal support. Your empire awaits—message us now!

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Logs King
A marketplace platform focused on the sale of social media account credentials and logs. The platform connects buyers and sellers of accounts across various social media platforms.

## Target Audience
- buyers and sellers of social media accounts
- Buyers and Sellers of Accounts
- Digital Marketers Seeking Influence
- Online Business Investors

## Industry
E-commerce / Digital Marketplace
